title: olyra semiovata var. humilis
intro: Olyra semiovata var. humilis, also known as the dwarf rhizome Olyra, is a type of plant belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Olyra semiovata var. humilis include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to improve digestion and immune function. Herbal preparations of Olyra semiovata var. humilis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and promote overall well-being.
